arts.ttl: Why Jackson is the key to ending Chelsea's winless run
arts.sum: In terms of shots from fast breaks, the Blues have three players inside the division’s top six, a list which also contains Wolves' talisman Matheus Cunha . This expected goal (xG) shot map from the last five matches shows where Jackson had his opportunities.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer: Saint Kitts and proud
arts.sum: Chelsea and England forward Cole Palmer proudly owns his Saint Kitts and Nevis roots. DJ on the island of Saint Kitts, Leslie 'Sugar Bowl' Morton IV, tells BBC Sport what he means to the country.

arts.ttl: Juventus turn to Chelsea and Newcastle defenders after Motta-Tomori chat
arts.sum: Several sources claim Renato Veiga and Lloyd Kelly are now Juventus’ primary targets after Fikayo...

arts.ttl: Moises Caicedo drops early Chelsea team news hint as Enzo Maresca explains Cole Palmer dilemma
arts.sum: While the West Londoners have had longer to prepare for the clash, Maresca could be without several big names, with Cole Palmer, Levi Colwill, Enzo Fernandez and Romeo Lavia described as doubts. The Chelsea boss said: "We have Cole who is a doubt, he was not in the session today.

arts.ttl: Juventus Eyes Chelsea Duo: Veiga and Chilwell in Transfer Crosshairs
arts.sum: Juventus are set to engage in discussions with Chelsea regarding a potential transfer of Renato Veiga. The 21-year-old versatile defender has recently been the subject of transfer speculation, with rumours of his departure from Stamford Bridge gaining traction in recent weeks. The post Juventus Eyes Chelsea Duo: Veiga and Chilwell in Transfer Crosshairs appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: ‘At the moment’: Enzo Maresca shares if Chelsea are planning to sell Tosin Adarabioyo in January transfer window
arts.sum: Chelsea have been linked with a number of exits as the January transfer window approaches its final few days. This has included a number of...

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues to hold 'summit' over double deal that could help Man City
arts.sum: Juventus reportedly plan to hold a transfer summit with Chelsea to discuss possible moves for left-back duo Renato Veiga and Ben Chilwell.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca claims Chelsea have received PGMOL apology during five-match winless run
arts.sum: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca claims the PGMOL have been in contact to issue an apology after a decision went against them, thought to be a penalty call in the draw with Crystal Palace

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer BLUNDER: Blues set to lose money on Joao Felix
arts.sum: AC Milan have reportedly stepped up their interest in Chelsea forward Joao Felix after turning down the chance to sign Manchester United outcast Marcus Rashford. The Serie A giants are only able to sign one non-EU player during the January transfer window, and they have chosen to bring Kyle Walker to the club, rather than Rashford.

arts.ttl: We simulated Chelsea vs Wolves to get a Premier League score prediction
arts.sum: Chelsea will be looking to put an end to their recent run of poor form in the Premier League when they take on relegation-battling Wolves this evening. The draw now leaves Chelsea winless in their last five league games, with Enzo Maresca's side entering the weekend 10 points off top spot.
